title: ZXSnake Controls
description: Practical control guidance for building stable movement patterns across all ZXSnake sessions.

sections.heading: ZXSnake Controls
paragraphs: Practical control guidance for building stable movement patterns across all ZXSnake sessions.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSnake controls
featureShowcases.summary: ZXSnake control guidance focuses on direction changes and turn timing.
body: Arcade sessions feel better when input timing is predictable, and focus on the practical habits that matter while the game is moving.
Read this after the how-to-play page when you want to understand what your hands should be doing during a real session.
bullets: Keeps input guidance close to gameplay.
Supports both first-time players and returning players.
Uses the current game artwork to support control guidance.

image.caption: ZXSnake controls artwork supports input and interaction guidance.

summary: ZXSnake controls focus on direction changes and turn timing.
